title: Impacket atexec Remote Scheduled Task Execution
description: Detects impacket atexec, which creates a transient scheduled task on a remote host (via the ATSvc/Task Scheduler) to run a command and redirect output to an admin share. Indicators: a task launched by the Task Scheduler running cmd with output redirected to ADMIN$/a temp marker file.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Parent Process Name' like '*svchost.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*taskeng.exe')) and (('Command Line' like '*cmd.exe*' and 'Command Line' like '*2>&1*')) and (('Command Line' like '*ADMIN$*' or 'Command Line' like '*Temp*' or 'Command Line' like '*2>&1*')))
